assertions.name: Uses ShaderUtil.GetShaderData
assertions.text: Uses ShaderUtil.GetShaderData to extract shader pass metadata

assertions.name: Iterates subshaders and passes with global passIndex
assertions.text: Iterates through all subshaders and their passes, building a global passIndex across all subshaders
assertions.evidence: ShaderPassExtractor.cs lines 115-146: nested for loops over shaderData.SubshaderCount and subShader.PassCount, incrementing globalPassIndex across all subshaders.

assertions.name: Extracts LightMode via FindTagValue reflection
assertions.text: Extracts LightMode tag from each pass (via FindTagValue reflection or similar)
assertions.evidence: ShaderPassExtractor.cs lines 306-348 (GetLightMode): tries direct .LightMode property first, then falls back to reflection-based FindTagValue("LightMode").

assertions.name: PassType guessing logic (ShadowCaster/Meta/Deferred)
assertions.text: Has PassType guessing logic based on passName/lightMode (e.g. ShadowCaster, Meta, Deferred)
assertions.evidence: ShaderPassExtractor.cs lines 400-438 (GuessPassType): maps string names to PassType enum, handling ShadowCaster, Meta, Deferred, ForwardBase, ForwardAdd, MotionVectors, etc.

assertions.name: FindByIndex method
assertions.text: Has FindByIndex method to look up pass metadata by global passIndex
assertions.evidence: ShaderPassExtractor.cs lines 181-190 (FindByIndex): iterates extracted passes and returns the one matching GlobalPassIndex, or null.

assertions.name: FindBestMatch with priority chain
assertions.text: Has fallback matching (FindBestMatch) with priority chain: passName → lightMode → PassType
assertions.evidence: ShaderPassExtractor.cs lines 204-246 (FindBestMatch): priority chain is 1) exact match by passName, 2) exact match by lightMode, 3) any pass by PassType, 4) first pass with non-empty Name.

assertions.name: Keyword normalization (split/sort/dedup)
assertions.text: Has keyword normalization: splits string, sorts, deduplicates
assertions.evidence: KeywordUtils.cs lines 27-54 (NormalizeKeywords): splits on whitespace/separators, filters empty, Distinct() to deduplicate, OrderBy() to sort alphabetically, then joins.

assertions.name: Composite dedup key includes passIndex+passName+lightMode
assertions.text: Uses composite key including passIndex AND passName/lightMode for deduplication (not just shader+passType+keywords)
assertions.evidence: ShaderVariantRecorder.cs lines 577-583 (MakeDedupKey): composite key is shaderPath + passIndex + passName + lightMode + normalizedKeywords. Also documented in ShaderVariantRecord comments lines 125-133.
